goal: 移除 0g.hk skill 中的本机路径和单用户状态

summary.title: Remove machine-specific state from 0g.hk skill
summary.what: Updated skill-packages/0g-hk/SKILL.md so the installable skill no longer contains a /Users/envvar checkout path, an installed-skill legacy ledger path, or single-user wording.
summary.why: A public installable skill must work for other users. Machine-specific paths and local migration assumptions belong in local operations, not the skill package.
summary.user_goal: 移除 0g.hk skill 中的本机路径和单用户状态

decisions.chose: Point to https://0g.hk/llms.txt, https://github.com/catoncat/0g-hk, and repo-relative docs/API.md when inside a checkout.
decisions.rationale: These references are valid for any installer and avoid leaking a maintainer's absolute filesystem path.
rejected: Name the maintainer's local product code path

decisions.chose: Describe local edit history as optional user-private data outside the installed skill package, using XDG_DATA_HOME/HOME as an example.
decisions.rationale: Every user needs their own private storage if they save edit credentials; the skill package should not assume this machine's ~/.agents layout or legacy migration state.
rejected: Treat the previous migration path as a public contract

decisions.chose: Describe 0g.hk as a public temporary note and short-link service instead of the user's service.
decisions.rationale: The skill is installable by other users, so runtime instructions should not encode this session's owner relationship.

rejected.alternative: Keep machine-specific paths because they are convenient on this Mac.
rejected.reason: Convenience for one maintainer would make the public skill confusing or wrong for other users.

anti_patterns.what: Adding absolute local checkout paths or per-machine migration state to the public 0g.hk skill package
anti_patterns.why: The package is installed from GitHub by other users; local state belongs in local docs, memory, or runtime configuration, not SKILL.md.

followups: Push the corrective commit and reinstall the global skill with npx skills add.

architectural_claims: The 0g-hk skill package is a public installable package and must avoid local absolute paths or maintainer-only state.
behavioral_changes: Agents loading the skill now use public/live truth sources and generic user-private ledger guidance instead of maintainer-specific paths.
security_implications: The skill still treats editToken, editPath, and editUrl as secrets and tells agents not to commit local ledger data.
migration_notes: Existing local ledger files are a local runtime concern; do not encode one machine's legacy path as public package behavior.
